svg.title: Aether — Intent-Based Retrieval Routing
svg.desc: Three retrieval paths depending on whether the query is a title, metadata, or concept question

sendPrompt('How does Aether handle concept-based queries?')

sendPrompt('What is RRF Fusion in the Aether retrieval pipeline?')
g.text: unified top-K · drop chunks below 0.25 similarity

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Aether produce a final verified answer?')
